completeness_critic.population: every test_*.py on disk under lib/test/
completeness_critic.independent_signal: git ls-files (index read, #711-safe) — distinct from the audit's Path.glob
completeness_critic.result: complete: all 11 disk suites classified into exactly one of pooled(3)/serial(1)/module-driven(7); no finding

phase3_findings.description: documented_falsehood: §19 + run.sh comment claim test_module_runner.py never executes harness-python-guards; it does (test_module_runner.py:1453)
launch-window race: pool registers live child after clearing _DEVFLOW_POOL_LAUNCHING, orphaning a child on a signal in the window
dropped-pending-suites: devflow_pool_join loop gated only on inflight>0; a mid-stream launch-allocation failure at width<count can exit with pending unlaunched
min(os.cpu_count(),4) in doc+changeset omits the `or 1` None-guard the code uses
self-tally summary derived via grep/tail (non-preflight PATH tools); fails closed
serial-retry path runs with main-shell TMPDIR rather than an isolated scratch root
classify_test_suites mislabels an intra-category duplicate as cross-category
test gaps: rendezvous-retry-on-self-tally, width-cap-bounds-concurrency, worker-nonzero-no-verdict arms untested

fix_decisions.evidence: Latent, not reachable in the shipped path: production width is min(cpu,4) >= 3 so devflow_pool_open pre-launches all 3 suites and pending is empty, so devflow_pool_join never takes the refill arm. Only reachable via DEVFLOW_POOL_WIDTH=1 plus a mktemp/scratch allocation failure. A correct minimal fix (loop while inflight>0 || pending>0, refilling when drained) is safe but needs an allocation-failure injection hook + a non-vacuous test; deferred to a follow-up rather than rushed into a heavily-pinned file this pass.
Real guard-class-2 style (corroborated x3) but fails CLOSED (missing grep -> empty summary -> run.sh else-arm records an explicit FAIL). Consistency-only; defer to a follow-up bash-builtin scan.
Isolation gap only on the rare rendezvous-timeout retry; low impact. Follow-up.
Cosmetic diagnostic wording; the defect is still caught.
Defensive coverage improvements; the reviewed correctness paths are covered. Follow-up.

verification_evidence.full_suite: 12941 passed, 0 failed, 1 skipped (pre-commit: #434 stale-prose self-scan self-skipped on dirty tree)

verification_evidence.new_pin_mutation_check: test_pool_registers_live_child_before_clearing_launch_guard verified RED on re-inverted ordering, GREEN on the fix
